summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase G2 (G2A: Baseball Savant + team stats + bullpen usage enrichment, G2B: Parlay Correlation Validator). All 13 tests passed (100%). Verified correlation_validator rules, parlay_builder logic, fail-soft behavior of enrichment functions, and integration endpoint /api/mlb/day with parlay_suggested field.
passed_tests: Auth: Login with demo@valuebet.app / demo1234 ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - Run Line + Over same game = POSITIVE +12, correlation_score=79, risk_level=LOW ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - Run Line + Under 7.5 same game = NEGATIVE -12, risk_level=MEDIUM ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - Run Line + Team Total Under SAME team = NEGATIVE -20, risk_level=HIGH, recommended_adjustments present ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - 3 Overs across DIFFERENT games = warnings contains '3 Overs en el parlay' ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - NRFI + F5 Under same game = POSITIVE +8, correlation_score=75, risk_level=LOW ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - Empty/single pick → correlation_score=100, risk=LOW ✅
Unit: correlation_validator - Same pitcher different games = NEGATIVE -6 'Ambos picks dependen del mismo pitcher' ✅
Unit: parlay_builder - 8 mixed picks returns best 2..4 combination (size=4, combined_score=328, risk_level=LOW) ✅
Unit: parlay_builder - HIGH-risk picks → returns MEDIUM risk parlay (correctly skips HIGH-risk combinations) ✅
Unit: baseball_savant.enrich_pitcher_dict - fail-soft on network failure (no crash, returns unchanged dict) ✅
Unit: mlb_team_stats.get_team_hand_splits - fail-soft with fake team_id (returns empty vs_lhp/vs_rhp) ✅
Integration: GET /api/mlb/day?date=2025-08-15 returns 200 with parlay_suggested field ✅
Integration: parlay_suggested has correct structure (parlay, validator, combined_score, size, rejected_count) ✅
Integration: validator has all required fields (correlation_score, risk_level, positive_correlations, negative_correlations, warnings, recommended_adjustments) ✅
Integration: pipeline_meta.games_processed=8, games_capped=7 (MAX_GAMES_PER_CALL=8 working correctly) ✅
Integration: per_source_urls field present in all picks/rescued/discarded entries ✅
Integration: per_source_urls.pitcher_confirmation is statsapi URL ✅
Integration: per_source_urls.home_team_hand URL present (team hand splits enrichment working) ✅
Integration: per_source_urls.home_bullpen_usage URL present (bullpen usage enrichment working) ✅
Integration: BULLPEN_FATIGUE_SIGNAL has source='MLB Stats API (gameLogs)' ✅
Integration: BULLPEN_FATIGUE_SIGNAL has source_url starting with https://statsapi.mlb.com/api/v1/teams/ ✅
